query:
SELECT
               id as "id!: i64",
               travel_type as "travel_type!: String",
               origin_name as "origin_name!: String",
               dest_name as "dest_name!: String",
               start_date as "start_date!: String"
           FROM hops
           WHERE user_id = ? AND user_trip_id IS NULL
           ORDER BY start_date DESC, id DESC
           LIMIT 200
